title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・誕生、そして

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro Dober! Mejiro Dober is the winner
today!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A new queen has conquered the turf of Yodo, and
her name is Mejiro Dooober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I, Mejiro Dober, beat Air Groove...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your performance was exemplary. You have
bested me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You've always been a shining and brilliant light
before me, and it's because of you that I was able
to run here today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks to that... I will never forget this race!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your challenge to me reaffirmed that I am also
walking down the right path.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For revealing that fact to me, I would like to give
you my thanks. From now on...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I shall be the one issuing challenges to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's race again. I hope we'll be able to compete
on even bigger stages someday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now then, everyone's waiting for you. You
shouldn't keep them in suspense for too long.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This is just the beginning! I'm going to keep
reaching for greater heights and shine even
brighter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Please continue to watch over me and remember
my name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I am the queen who conquered Yodo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And the one who earned this spectacular crown
for the prestigious Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bursting into full bloom and shining with a new
light at the dawn of another Mejiro era is none
other than I, Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cheers for Mejiro Dober seem to echo on and
on for ages.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
And now, a special feature on the legacies of the
Mejiro family! Our first spotlight is on none other
than the winner of the Queen Elizabeth II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober! Wow! Talk about a fantastic
performance!

text_block_list.name: Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
I completely agree. That speed and grace of hers
makes her the perfect light to usher in a new era
of Mejiro racers!

text_block_list.name: Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
Dober is incredible, but we can't forget Mejiro
Bright! Her performance at the spring Tenno Sho
was...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. ♪ Looks like we've made a bit of
progress, haven't we, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but this is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Our legacies... and this new era of the Mejiro
family is only just beginning!
